subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses and hath spoken that which became a sword unto the ungodly and a mercy unto the righteous who have acknowledged His utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انزل الآیات و نطق بما کان سیفا للفجار و رحمه للاخیار الذین اعترفوا بما نطق
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God
